title: Amazon, eBay, Newegg & Shopify Price & Stock Monitor

startUrls.title: Product URLs
startUrls.description: Direct product page URLs to monitor. Platform is auto-detected. Production-supported stores: Amazon, eBay, Newegg, and Shopify (/products/ URLs).

searches.title: Keyword Searches
searches.description: Search by keyword on Amazon, eBay, or Newegg. Returns up to maxResults products per keyword, then scrapes full product details. Shopify requires direct product URLs.

platform.title: Platform
platform.description: Store to search on (Amazon, eBay, or Newegg)

maxResults.title: Max Products per Keyword
maxResults.description: How many products to scrape from search results for this keyword

trackHistory.title: Track Price History
trackHistory.description: Persist price history across runs in Key-Value Store for min/max/avg stats.

alertOnPriceDrop.title: Alert on Price Drop
alertOnPriceDrop.description: Trigger an alert when price drops by at least the threshold percentage.

priceDropThresholdPercent.title: Price Drop Threshold (%)
priceDropThresholdPercent.description: Minimum price drop percentage to trigger an alert (0 = any drop).

alertOnAnyPriceChange.title: Alert on Any Price Change
alertOnAnyPriceChange.description: Trigger an alert on any price change, including increases.

alertOnStockChange.title: Alert on Stock Changes
alertOnStockChange.description: Trigger an alert when stock status changes (in stock ↔ out of stock).

alertOnBackInStock.title: Alert When Back in Stock
alertOnBackInStock.description: Trigger an alert when a previously out-of-stock item becomes available.

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrent Requests
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of product pages scraped in parallel. Use 1–2 for large lists or heavy anti-bot sites.

maxRequestRetries.title: Max Request Retries
maxRequestRetries.description: Number of times to retry failed requests (rotates proxy on failure).

twoCaptchaApiKey.title: 2Captcha API Key (optional)
twoCaptchaApiKey.description: Optional 2Captcha API key for solving reCAPTCHA, hCaptcha, or Cloudflare Turnstile on bot pages. Prefer storing TWOCAPTCHA_API_KEY as an Apify secret environment variable instead of pasting here.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify Proxy settings. US residential proxy strongly recommended for Amazon and eBay.
